title: taraxacum mosciense
intro: Taraxacum mosciense, commonly known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum mosciense include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum mosciense can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including liver and kidney issues.
